extra.reason: Added public/favicon.svg (SVG with T initial, brand colors) and public/favicon.ico (16x16 ICO fallback). Added link rel=icon tags to MainLayout.astro head. Build confirmed. Kills the Lighthouse 404 console error.

Already fixed — [...slug].astro line 40 calls deriveDescription(post.body, post.data.description) as a fallback. Verified: posts without frontmatter description get auto-derived meta description from body text in the built HTML. No code change needed.

Fixed all 16 TS errors: Header.astro — inlined isActiveNavPath calls to avoid const declaration in template scope (TS1109/2304); rss.xml.ts, work.astro, ProjectTease.astro, CareerTimeline.astro, ArchiveProjects.astro — added explicit CollectionEntry<T> type annotations on callback parameters where Zod deprecation warnings were breaking getCollection inference. astro check now reports 0 errors, 0 warnings. Build clean, 27 unit tests passing.

Added deriveDescription import and fallback to blog/index.astro and blog/tags/[tag].astro. Both pages now call deriveDescription(post.body, post.data.description) instead of passing raw post.data.description. Build confirms 26 description paragraphs in blog index — all non-archived posts now show excerpts.

Wrapped @supports (animation-timeline: scroll()) block inside @media (prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference) in global.css. Animation now only runs when user has not set a reduced-motion preference. Build clean, 27 tests passing.
